item.title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]

Pulse Audio

WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]

item.title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods ArchIso Creator [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)
Archiso Creator v1.03 03-10-2024
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

currently dwarfs is not supported
though you can convert to dwarfs .iso wont boot
the text in application is old
please click information button fpr updated text same as this text



i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs i used it before making this
you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i convert from sqausfhs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs





dependancies are supplied in the applications folder
you will also need calamares installed
i provide this package in the applications folder
use command sudo pacman -U "filename.tar.gz"
to install the calamares package

please also launch the cpp script
called claudemods-arch-dependancy-installer in konsole
it will install all other dependancies needed








installation
downloaded .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
place .desktop in usr/share/applications as it will be needed later!

information!!!
information in application tab is wrong
please click the information button to read this txt document
only the linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1 works
the latest kernel i think is broken ive done many tests
other than that all works please follow the guides












Keep the file name to a minimum
Understand this is in beta though things have been tested im no genuis im working on it
Read known issues and changelogs for more info


basic functions
1: create squashfs/ convert to dwarfs
2: select squashfs/dwarfs
3: edit cfg files boot artwork
4: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



method to creation a iso PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
steps to create a arch iso with linux zen kernel
step 1: create a squashfs convert to dwarfs if you wish though booting a dwarfs hasnt been tested yet
step 2: edit syslinux boot cfg and boot artwork
step 3: name your iso and create it iso tag will be 2024


installing your system with calamares PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
change installsystem.sh from /dev/vda2 to your drive once calamares is installed

step 1: when you boot the iso you will need to open the application again
step 2: click the tools and extras button then click the button "install your system"
step 3: please do not reboot your system after calamares is finished
step 4: close calamares and let the additional script run taking 30 seconds of your time
step 5: once the script is finished you may reboot
thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale



known issues
dwarfs isnt tested yet
system information button function was remove during updates


changelogs

v1.04 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
support for dwarfs



v1.03 Beta 03/10/2024
rewritten to be completely for arch cpp qt 6.7.2
extra dependancies needed for the functions
new ui and mechanism
alot of functions have been upgraded
you can now add boot image
you can edit isolinux and grub cfgs
extra compression methods for squashfs and dwarfs
you can now install isos that are created with linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1

v1.02 19/09/2024
updated sqaushfs creation mechanism
option to convert to dwarfs added
watch my youtube video showing the progress https://youtu.be/xRpXsfblVj4

v1.01 19/09/2024
squashfs function added
you can now create a bootable squashfs keeping your user data
the file will be called filesystem.squashfs
you can use the squashfs to make a bootable iso
you can login like normal but you cannot install from .iso just yet
Added Support for 4gb+ squashfs files with new -level 3 command

v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso


thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

if you can fork my code from the binary files i provide here is my notice!!!!
Copyright <2024> Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the “Software”), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions: The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software. THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

[read more]
item.description:
claudemods ArchIso Creator
(Utilities)
Archiso Creator v1.03 03-10-2024
Sailing the 7 seas like Penguin's Eggs Remastersys, Refracta, Systemback and father Knoppix!

currently dwarfs is not supported
though you can convert to dwarfs .iso wont boot
the text in application is old
please click information button fpr updated text same as this text



i made this for creating Arch .iso for my distributions
since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs i used it before making this
you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i convert from sqausfhs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs





dependancies are supplied in the applications folder
you will also need calamares installed
i provide this package in the applications folder
use command sudo pacman -U "filename.tar.gz"
to install the calamares package

please also launch the cpp script
called claudemods-arch-dependancy-installer in konsole
it will install all other dependancies needed








installation
downloaded .zip and .desktop needed
extract .zip to /opt
place .desktop in usr/share/applications as it will be needed later!

information!!!
information in application tab is wrong
please click the information button to read this txt document
only the linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1 works
the latest kernel i think is broken ive done many tests
other than that all works please follow the guides












Keep the file name to a minimum
Understand this is in beta though things have been tested im no genuis im working on it
Read known issues and changelogs for more info


basic functions
1: create squashfs/ convert to dwarfs
2: select squashfs/dwarfs
3: edit cfg files boot artwork
4: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



method to creation a iso PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
steps to create a arch iso with linux zen kernel
step 1: create a squashfs convert to dwarfs if you wish though booting a dwarfs hasnt been tested yet
step 2: edit syslinux boot cfg and boot artwork
step 3: name your iso and create it iso tag will be 2024


installing your system with calamares PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
change installsystem.sh from /dev/vda2 to your drive once calamares is installed

step 1: when you boot the iso you will need to open the application again
step 2: click the tools and extras button then click the button "install your system"
step 3: please do not reboot your system after calamares is finished
step 4: close calamares and let the additional script run taking 30 seconds of your time
step 5: once the script is finished you may reboot
thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale



known issues
dwarfs isnt tested yet
system information button function was remove during updates


changelogs

v1.04 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
support for dwarfs



v1.03 Beta 03/10/2024
rewritten to be completely for arch cpp qt 6.7.2
extra dependancies needed for the functions
new ui and mechanism
alot of functions have been upgraded
you can now add boot image
you can edit isolinux and grub cfgs
extra compression methods for squashfs and dwarfs
you can now install isos that are created with linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1

v1.02 19/09/2024
updated sqaushfs creation mechanism
option to convert to dwarfs added
watch my youtube video showing the progress https://youtu.be/xRpXsfblVj4

v1.01 19/09/2024
squashfs function added
you can now create a bootable squashfs keeping your user data
the file will be called filesystem.squashfs
you can use the squashfs to make a bootable iso
you can login like normal but you cannot install from .iso just yet
Added Support for 4gb+ squashfs files with new -level 3 command

v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso


thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

if you can fork my code from the binary files i provide here is my notice!!!!

since its getting alot harder with things breaking these days
big recommendation to Penguin's Eggs i used it before making this
you should be able to copy a dwarfs to the iso no problem
im yet to test this with my dwarfs i convert from sqausfhs
i will also be adding this into this application for those who want to convert
i managed to skim 400mb off a squashfs with compression 7 with dwarfs





dependancies are supplied in the applications folder
you will also need calamares installed
i provide this package in the applications folder
use command sudo pacman -U "filename.tar.gz"
to install the calamares package

please also launch the cpp script
called claudemods-arch-dependancy-installer in konsole
it will install all other dependancies needed

extract .zip to /opt
place .desktop in usr/share/applications as it will be needed later!

please click the information button to read this txt document
only the linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1 works
the latest kernel i think is broken ive done many tests
other than that all works please follow the guides












Keep the file name to a minimum
Understand this is in beta though things have been tested im no genuis im working on it
Read known issues and changelogs for more info


basic functions
1: create squashfs/ convert to dwarfs
2: select squashfs/dwarfs
3: edit cfg files boot artwork
4: create an iso in the applications directory e.g /opt/claudemods-ArchIso-Creator/



method to creation a iso PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
steps to create a arch iso with linux zen kernel
step 1: create a squashfs convert to dwarfs if you wish though booting a dwarfs hasnt been tested yet
step 2: edit syslinux boot cfg and boot artwork
step 3: name your iso and create it iso tag will be 2024


installing your system with calamares PLEASE READ CAREFULLY!!!
change installsystem.sh from /dev/vda2 to your drive once calamares is installed

step 1: when you boot the iso you will need to open the application again
step 2: click the tools and extras button then click the button "install your system"
step 3: please do not reboot your system after calamares is finished
step 4: close calamares and let the additional script run taking 30 seconds of your time
step 5: once the script is finished you may reboot
thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale



known issues
dwarfs isnt tested yet
system information button function was remove during updates


changelogs

v1.04 not released yet
things being currently added before testing
support for dwarfs



v1.03 Beta 03/10/2024
rewritten to be completely for arch cpp qt 6.7.2
extra dependancies needed for the functions
new ui and mechanism
alot of functions have been upgraded
you can now add boot image
you can edit isolinux and grub cfgs
extra compression methods for squashfs and dwarfs
you can now install isos that are created with linuz zen kernel 6.10.10.zen1-1

v1.02 19/09/2024
updated sqaushfs creation mechanism
option to convert to dwarfs added
watch my youtube video showing the progress https://youtu.be/xRpXsfblVj4

v1.01 19/09/2024
squashfs function added
you can now create a bootable squashfs keeping your user data
the file will be called filesystem.squashfs
you can use the squashfs to make a bootable iso
you can login like normal but you cannot install from .iso just yet
Added Support for 4gb+ squashfs files with new -level 3 command

v1.0 17/09/2024
current functions
select squashfs or dwarfs
change boot menu name
change .iso name to what you want
create a bootable Arch iso


thank you for using claudemods iso creator v1.03!!!
show appreciation and support me
with my paypal link >>> https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

if you can fork my code from the binary files i provide here is my notice!!!!

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

[read more]

item.title: Libonex 2024 [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Libonex 2024 [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: srevilprod
item.itunes:summary:
Libonex 2024
(Arcade)
Il ne sert à rien d'essayer de s'en tenir à un Libonex alors que vous en auriez auparavant un autre. À quoi sert exactement cela ? Libonex exécuté correctement devrait vous aider à voir où va votre Libonex. Voici un certain nombre de suppositions. Le temps s'arrête lorsque vous avez Libonex. Quels plans avez-vous pour être plus efficace et productif lorsque vous traitez avec Libonex ? L'exemple ci-dessus montre que je ne savais pas vraiment ce que je visais en ce qui concerne cette conception. Cette bataille ne fait que commencer et elle va être féroce. Pour le dire autrement, voici un autre voyageur sur cette route vers cela. J'essaie de m'échapper de mon ornière Libonex.
Achetez maintenant ===> https://www.histoire-costume.fr/libonex/

https://libonex-capsules-fr.company.site/
https://libonexperformcapsules.quora.com/
https://libonexavis.sites.kaltura.com/
https://www.tournifyapp.com/live/libonexavis
https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/libonex-perform-capsules
https://libonex-capsules-fr.mywebselfsite.net/
https://sites.google.com/view/libonexavis/
https://sites.google.com/view/libonex-capsules/
https://groups.google.com/g/libonex-perform-capsules/c/0TSmvQtqdqw


[read more]

(Arcade)
Il ne sert à rien d'essayer de s'en tenir à un Libonex alors que vous en auriez auparavant un autre. À quoi sert exactement cela ? Libonex exécuté correctement devrait vous aider à voir où va votre Libonex. Voici un certain nombre de suppositions. Le temps s'arrête lorsque vous avez Libonex. Quels plans avez-vous pour être plus efficace et productif lorsque vous traitez avec Libonex ? L'exemple ci-dessus montre que je ne savais pas vraiment ce que je visais en ce qui concerne cette conception. Cette bataille ne fait que commencer et elle va être féroce. Pour le dire autrement, voici un autre voyageur sur cette route vers cela. J'essaie de m'échapper de mon ornière Libonex.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: Webcamoid [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: Webcamoid [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: hipersayanx
item.itunes:summary:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]
item.description:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
